text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Dec 17 16:28:39 2013
New Revision: 336740
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336740

Log:
  - Release maintainership at maintainer request
  
  PR:		ports/184452
  Submitted by:	"Mikhail T." <m.tsatsenko@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/mail/popper/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/mail/popper/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/popper/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 16:25:53 2013	(r336739)
+++ head/mail/popper/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 16:28:39 2013	(r336740)
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.qualcomm.com/eud
 DISTNAME=	q${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.Z
 
-MAINTAINER=	m.tsatsenko@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Berkeley POP 3 server (now maintained by Qualcomm)
 
 # Set WITH_POPPER_YOUBIN_SUPPORT variable in the environment to enable
